sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Game is over. Let me check if clicking the black bar (left edge) does anything
# The black bar seems to be at column 0, rows 31-94 or so

# Try clicking the black bar
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 32, 'col': 0}])
print(f"After clicking (32,0): board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, done={last_action_result.get('done')}")

if not last_action_result.get('board_changed'):
    # Try clicking the green bar at the top
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 1, 'col': 11}])
    print(f"After clicking (1,11): board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, done={last_action_result.get('done')}")
    
    if not last_action_result.get('board_changed'):
        # Try clicking the yellow X markers
        action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 25, 'col': 34}])
        print(f"After clicking (25,34): board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
        
        # Try clicking the dark gray background
        action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 15, 'col': 15}])
        print(f"After clicking (15,15): board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
        
        # Try clicking the gray background
        action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 50, 'col': 50}])
        print(f"After clicking (50,50): board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
